authorization_basis: docs/review/comments.md (final ruling) — Disposition A; conditional-coverage fallback rule; total eligibility decision table.

superseded_authority.supersession_scope: forward-only, successor execution only; the prior authority is preserved unchanged and is not retroactively validated.

fallback_selection_audit.selection_basis: conditional-coverage tie (U_P1=U_P2=0, both rescue all 5 primary failures); tie-break on lower authoritative standalone count (51 < 59).

marginal_count_correction.note: 50/58 are from the non-authoritative MR002_ComplementaryCoverage.json (owner ruling 2026-07-14 sec.5). Ranking robust; 5/51/59 used throughout.

failures_are_numerical_not_economic.primary_outcome_on_all_5_FQ: ValueError: constraints are inconsistent, no solution

predicate.rules: exact as_integer_ratio inputs, outward-rounded >=100-digit intervals, NO max(Gamma,0), NO cushion, NO KKT-to-objective conversion

frozen_config.primary: QUADPROG_SQRT (active-set quadprog under z=diag(sqrt(t)) v; S^T H S = 2I exactly)
frozen_config.fallback: PIQP_P2 (proximal interior-point; mr002_piqp.py BASE settings; preconditioner_scale_cost=true; fresh solver per instance; no warm start)
frozen_config.cascade: QUADPROG_SQRT -> (eligible numerical nonqualification) -> PIQP_P2 once; both-fail -> UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE -> STOP; no third attempt / jitter / tolerance change / row-specific routing

quarantine_non_reuse.reuse: PROHIBITED for primary/fallback/eligibility/certificate/population/threshold; clean successor rerun regenerates all evidence anew.
quarantine_non_reuse.future_unresolved_set: unknown until executed; NOT asserted zero; the quarantined 3839/3839 is inadmissible.

authorized_on_countersignature: clean successor rerun under sec.10 given a separate execution countersignature
